title: Late Chrysanthemums
writer: Fumiko Hayashi, Sumie Tanaka, Toshirô Ide
actors: Haruko Sugimura, Ken Uehara, Sadako Sawamura
plot: What is the life of a Geisha like once her beauty has faded and she has retired? Kin has saved her money, and has become a wealthy money-lender, spending her days cold-heartedly collecting debts. Even her best friends, Tomi, Nobu,...
